title: Augmented Autojump
description: Does vanilla autojump make you want to punch a wall?
body:
Tired of autojump making you jump when you scrape the corner of the block? Does autojump constantly jump too late causing you to loose your sprint? Try Augmented Autojump!

Watch on Odysee: https://odysee.com/@coolmineman:0/augmented-autojump:d ### Discord [![Join The Discord](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/844335788384452619/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/ZfNH3BUVth)
